menu.rules:
Drag your finger — the star responds instantly.
Dodge everything. Sweep the star dust.
3 lives. The galaxy speeds up every 30 s.
pause.title: PAUSE
gameover.title: EXTINCTION
gameover.savePrompt: Publish your score to the leaderboard
gameover.saveGuest: Score saved — connect a wallet to rank it.
bigbang.connect: 🌌 BIG BANG #{n} · {price} CRO — connect a wallet
bigbang.headline: Resume your run exactly where you died.
bigbang.errFunds: Not enough CRO — you need {price} CRO (+ gas) on Cronos.
bigbang.errChain: Switch your wallet to the Cronos network, then try again.
bigbang.errNoWallet: Connect your wallet to launch a Big Bang.
store.title: BIG BANG STORE
store.subtitle: Fuel up for future missions. Pay once, then continue instantly — no wallet after every Game Over.
store.purchased: ✓ +{n} Big Bangs added to your account!
store.errFunds: Not enough CRO — you need {n} CRO (+ gas) on Cronos.
store.errTimeout: No payment request appeared in your wallet. Reopen your wallet on Cronos, or tap Reconnect, then try Buy again.
store.awaitingConfirm: Payment request sent. Open your wallet to confirm it, then come back here.
store.openWalletManual: Switch to your wallet app to confirm the payment, then come back to the game.
store.noCronosTitle: This wallet can't pay on Cronos over WalletConnect
store.noCronosMsg: Your wallet didn't grant Cronos to the connection, so the payment can't be routed. Open the game inside your wallet's built-in browser (Crypto.com Onchain → Browser tab), paste the link below, then buy from there — the payment appears natively.
store.copied: ✓ Link copied — paste it in your wallet's browser
store.payDirectTitle: Pay with CRO — works with any wallet
store.payStep1: 1. Send at least {n} CRO on Cronos to this address (a normal transfer from your wallet):
store.payWhy: Your wallet can't confirm a Cronos payment here — so pay directly. It takes a minute and always works.
store.payStep1b: 1. Send this amount on Cronos to the address below (a normal transfer from your Crypto.com app):
store.payStep2: 2. Paste the transaction hash to unlock your Big Bangs:
store.payErrFormat: That doesn't look like a transaction hash (0x + 64 characters).
store.payErrNotFound: Transaction not found yet. Wait a few seconds after sending, then try again.
store.payErrPending: Transaction still pending — wait for it to confirm, then try again.
store.payErrRecipient: That transaction wasn't sent to the game's address.
store.payErrChain: That transaction isn't on the Cronos network.
store.payErrUnderpaid: That transaction paid less than {n} CRO.
store.payErrNetwork: Couldn't reach Cronos to verify — check your connection and try again.
store.payErrUsed: That transaction was already used for a purchase.
store.switchTitle: Your wallet isn't on the Cronos network
store.switchManual: If it doesn't switch automatically, open your wallet and select the Cronos Mainnet network (Chain ID 25), then tap Buy again.
store.reconnectTitle: Reconnect your wallet for Cronos payments
store.reconnectMsg: Your wallet session was paired on another network, so Cronos payments don't appear. Reconnect once to enable them, then tap Buy again.
wallet.cancelled: Connection cancelled — retry or continue as guest.
wallet.noConfig: Wallet not configured (VITE_WC_PROJECT_ID missing and no injected wallet) — guest mode available.
wallet.guestNote: Without connecting, your score won't be added to the leaderboard.
wallet.rankedNote: Your best score will be saved to the public leaderboard.
wallet.otherNet: Network other than Cronos — score signing still works.
controls.title: CONTROLS
prize.bonus: Community Bonus: {bonus} CRO (30% of the month's Big Bangs)
lb.empty: No scores this period — be the first!
lb.title: GALACTIC LEADERBOARD
lb.heroSub: Compete every week and every month to earn CRO rewards.
profile.title: PROFILE
profile.guest: Connect your wallet to create your profile.
profile.chooseNicknameSub: It will represent you across the game.
profile.avatarHint: Generated from your wallet — replace it anytime.
stats.title: STATISTICS
history.title: GAME HISTORY
rewards.title: REWARDS
rewards.monthlyReward: Equivalent of $50 USD (paid in CRO) + Community Bonus
